notes: Added v1.2 second pass: extract_amity_namespace() walks all .ts files under packages/sdk/src/@types/ using brace-depth tracking to find declare global { namespace Amity { } } blocks. @types files scanned: 54 (find -name *.ts under ATYPES_DIR). Total Amity namespace members added: 694 (amity_global_members stat). Confirmed: LiveCollection, InvitationTargetType, StreamStatus — all found. namespaced_members_total: 1072 (prev: 378, +694 from Amity namespace). Drift report change: 64 → 81 issues (net +17). The increase is EXPECTED: the Amity namespace is now known so Amity.XType.member refs are now checked; 17 new issues are sub-member paths like Amity.AdPlacement.FEED, Amity.SessionStates.ESTABLISHED, Amity.StoryItemType.Hyperlink — enum values not captured in v1.2 (known limitation, flatten-only pass). 14 bare import { AmityClient/AmityComment/AmityCommentReferenceType } issues remain flagged correctly as unknown_import_from_sdk — these types exist as Amity.XType, not as root exports. extractor_version bumped to 0.1.2. No changes to existing barrel-walk logic.
